backend/main.mo: Main Motoko actor defining all data types (Journey, LocationInfo, CityAlbum, TravelSpot, MusicAlbum, etc.) and stable state maps for a travel/map explorer app, integrating blob storage, access control, and registry mixins.
feature_evidence.json: Feature evidence report listing four UI features for LocationMapExplorer.tsx: restoring upper-left button placement, opening popups on the right side, restoring 3D/2D toggle buttons, and removing the bottom-left local time display.
frontend-file-summaries.txt: Auto-generated JSON document summarizing each frontend source file's purpose and recent changes, serving as a reference for build planning and component documentation.
frontend/index.html: Root HTML entry point for the React app, loading the SunCalc library via CDN and mounting the app into a div with id 'root'.
frontend/src/App.tsx: Root React component that wraps the app in ThemeProvider, InternetIdentityProvider, and QueryClientProvider, rendering LocationMapExplorer alongside BackendDebugger and a toast notifier.
frontend/src/components/AdminPanel.tsx: Admin panel component providing tabbed management of journeys, schedules (keyed by journey title), travel spots, music albums, and geographic/timezone data with full CRUD dialogs and calendar pickers.
Invisible utility component that exposes the backend actor as window.backend and logs debugging instructions (role checks, admin promotion) to the browser console on mount.
frontend/src/components/CityAlbumManager: A React component for managing city photo/video albums, supporting file uploads, media removal, and social media link management with authentication via Internet Identity.
frontend/src/components/CityloguePanel.t: An empty file with no content or exports.
frontend/src/components/GeonameGeographi: A React admin component for managing a geonames city database, supporting CSV file import, paginated browsing, search, and CRUD operations on city records.
frontend/src/components/HeartRating.tsx: A React heart-based rating component that renders 10 hearts with support for partial fills, hover states, and click-based rating input on a 0–10 scale.
frontend/src/components/InteractiveGlobe: A Three.js-powered interactive 3D globe component with features including country borders, city markers, timezone overlays, solar terminator, and flight path animations.
frontend/src/components/itinerary/Doodle: Renders a scrapbook/doodle-styled itinerary dialog for a given journey, displaying schedule items grouped by day with Comic Sans styling, amber color palette, and scroll area.
frontend/src/components/itinerary/RetroI: Renders a retro vintage postcard-styled itinerary dialog for a given journey, displaying schedule items grouped by day with serif fonts, postmark effects, and an amber/red color palette.
frontend/src/components/LocationInfoDial: A dialog component for adding, editing, or deleting a photo associated with a map location, using blob storage for file uploads and backend mutations for persistence.
frontend/src/components/LoginPanel.tsx: A dialog-based authentication panel that handles Internet Identity login and logout, displaying the user's principal ID and current auth status.
frontend/src/components/MapComponent.tsx: A Leaflet-based interactive map component that renders travel spots, schedule items, and bookmarks as markers with popups, supporting zoom controls, city filtering, and a dialog for adding new bookmarks.
frontend/src/components/MediaGalleryPopu: A tabbed media gallery popup component that displays photos, videos, and embedded social media links (YouTube, Instagram) for a travel spot, with carousel navigation for photos.
frontend/src/components/MusicAlbumManage: An admin UI component for managing music albums and songs, supporting CRUD operations on albums and file-upload-based song addition with search functionality.
frontend/src/components/MusicPanel.tsx: A dialog-based music panel that lists all music albums and their songs, allowing the user to select a song for playback via a callback prop.
frontend/src/components/MusicPlayerBar.t: A persistent audio player bar component that plays songs from the user's music albums, supporting play/pause, skip, volume control, and syncing with an externally selected song.
frontend/src/components/TimezoneManageme: A React component for uploading and managing timezone GeoJSON data, supporting file upload to a backend canister and IndexedDB caching, with a manual multi-step execution flow for persisting and verifying the data.
A panel component that displays all journeys categorized as live, upcoming, or past, with expandable schedule previews and options to trigger flight animations, 2D map views, and itinerary dialogs.
frontend/src/components/TravelSpotManage: A CRUD management component for travel spots, allowing users to add, edit, delete, and search spots by city, with support for media file uploads and social media link attachments.
frontend/src/components/VibesPanel.tsx: A panel component that aggregates and displays bookmarks and travel spots grouped by city and type, with collapsible sections and type-specific icons and color coding.
frontend/src/components/WebsiteLayoutPan: A settings dialog component for managing website layout preferences such as toggling the music player bar, setting the default search location, and displaying the current local time and UTC offset.
frontend/src/hooks/useActor.ts: Custom hook that creates and caches an authenticated or anonymous ICP backend actor using React Query, and invalidates dependent queries whenever the actor changes.
frontend/src/hooks/useInternetIdentity.t: Provides an Internet Identity authentication context and hook, managing AuthClient creation, login/logout flows, and identity persistence with status tracking.
frontend/src/hooks/useQueries.ts: Central data-fetching module exporting React Query hooks and mutations for all backend entities (journeys, locations, music, schedules, etc.), plus utilities for geocoding, country normalization, and social media URL validation.
frontend/src/index.css: Global stylesheet defining Tailwind base imports, CSS custom properties for light/dark theme tokens (colors, sidebar, music player), and utility overrides for heading colors and layout.
frontend/src/lib/solarCalculations.ts: Provides a function to calculate solar declination angle for a given day of the year, plus test cases validating results at equinoxes and solstices.
frontend/src/lib/timezoneOffsetUtils.ts: Exports a utility function that returns all timezone IDs matching a given UTC offset (with quarter-hour precision) by querying the Intl API against GeoJSON timezone data.
frontend/src/lib/timezoneUtils.ts: Loads and caches timezone GeoJSON boundary data using IndexedDB and a backend fetch, exposing utilities for timezone detection and local time calculations.
frontend/src/lib/TzOverlayV2.ts: Renders timezone boundaries on a 3D globe using Three.js, with support for quarter-hour UTC offset precision, antimeridian unwrapping, and optional translucent fill meshes for hovered regions.
frontend/src/main.tsx: Application entry point that mounts the React app with React Query and Internet Identity authentication providers.
frontend/src/pages/LocationMapExplorer.t: Main map/globe explorer page featuring a 2D map and 3D interactive globe, with panels for search, timezone overlay, world clock, travel logs, music, and admin settings.
frontend/src/utils/scheduleDayStyling.ts: Provides color palette and helper functions for assigning day labels (D1, D2, …), colors, and formatted date strings to schedule items based on their chronological day index.
frontend/src/utils/scheduleRouteUtils.ts: Groups schedule items by calendar day, sorts them chronologically by time, and builds per-day route coordinate arrays for map rendering.
frontend/src/utils/urlParams.ts: Utility functions for reading, storing, and clearing URL parameters from both query strings and hash-based routing, with sessionStorage persistence support.
frontend/tailwind.config.js: Tailwind CSS configuration defining custom theme tokens (colors via OKLCH variables, border radius, shadows, animations) and enabling typography, container-queries, and animate plugins.
project_state.json: Project state tracking file for a Country Map Explorer app, recording current version, architectural notes, and four existing UI fix features (button positioning, popup placement, 3D/2D toggle restoration, and time display removal).
